questions.question: Insert three records into the employee table using SQL and then rollback. What will be the effect on the data?
questions.hint: Describe the effect of rollback on the data

questions.question: Write a SQL statement to insert the following records into the employee table: EMPNO 'E101', ENAME 'John', JOB 'Manager', MANAGER_NO 0, SAL 50000, COMMISSION 0.5. Use rollback.
questions.hint: Ensure to use the correct SQL syntax

questions.question: Insert the following records into the employee table: EMPNO 'E102', ENAME 'Alice', JOB 'Employee', MANAGER_NO 0, SAL 60000, COMMISSION 0.2. Then, use a SQL statement to delete one of the records and rollback. What will be the effect on the data?
questions.hint: Describe the effect of rollback on the data
